MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Newman for Petitioner.

Mr. Newman stated that he completed the petition, that it was sent out to the Successor Trustee and that he had not received it back. The matter was continued to February 23, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
